---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Credit Card Manager
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Application Area

Which part of the application does this affect?

- [ ] Auth / onboarding
- [ ] Cards / household attribution
- [ ] Overview / metrics
- [ ] Paydown / promo payoff
- [ ] Payments / runway / intents
- [ ] Statements / search
- [ ] Settings / notifications
- [ ] Testing / CI / tooling
- [ ] Other

## Use Case

Who would use this feature and how? Describe the workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

What other solutions or workarounds have you considered?

## Implementation Ideas

(Optional) Technical suggestions for how this could be implemented.

---

### Maintainer Checklist

- [ ] Requirements clarified
- [ ] Acceptance criteria defined
- [ ] Design reviewed (if UI change)
- [ ] Implementation planned
- [ ] Tests defined (Vitest and/or Playwright)
